description: QA validation checklist for affiliate post pipeline. Each item has a severity: BLOCKER (must fix before publish) or WARNING (flag but allow).

checks.rule: The post must include a meta_description field. It must be written in natural Danish.
checks.validation: Field meta_description must be non-empty string.

checks.rule: Meta description must be between 150 and 160 characters (inclusive).

checks.description: Primary keyword present in H1 title
checks.rule: The article title (H1) must contain the primary_keyword from the brief.
The primary keyword should appear in the first 100 words of body content.
checks.validation: primary_keyword appears in first 100 words of body

checks.rule: Primary keyword density should be between 0.5% and 2.5% of total word count.
All article content (title, body, meta) must be in natural, high-quality Danish. No English sentences or paragraphs allowed.
Raw URLs (http:// or https://) must not appear anywhere in the generated content. Only link shortcodes or IDs are permitted.
Total word count must meet or exceed the minimum defined in the brief (min_words). Default minimum is 800 words.
Total word count should not exceed brief.max_words if specified.
The post must contain at least one CTA shortcode in the format [affiliate_button id="..." text="..."].
checks.validation: Regex match for \[affiliate_button id="[^"]+" text="[^"]+"\] count >= 1

checks.rule: All affiliate_button IDs used in the post must exist in the brief's affiliate_ids list.
checks.validation: Every CTA id value is in brief.affiliate_ids

checks.rule: The text attribute of every affiliate_button shortcode must be written in Danish.
checks.validation: CTA text does not contain English-only phrases

checks.rule: All sections marked required=true in the template must be present in the post.
checks.validation: Each template section with required=true has a corresponding heading in the post

checks.rule: Sections should appear in the same order as defined in the template.
checks.validation: Section headings appear in template-defined order

checks.rule: The post must include an affiliate disclosure statement. It must be in Danish.
